purpose: Phase 16 Share Kit / Social Distribution Engine for Matrix Reprogrammed. This data defines copy-ready public share kits that route readers back to evidence, trust, feeds, downloads, books, and authority clusters.
rules: Share kits must route back to source, trust, or evidence pages.
Hooks may be dramatic, but claims must remain bounded.
Every kit needs short copy, thread copy, video caption copy, and archive routes.
No share kit should imply guilt from association.
Share kits should create curiosity and send readers to the archive.
Outputs must be public, reusable, and free of private data.

kits.title: Black File Starter Share Kit
kits.label: Starter share pack
kits.summary: Share-ready copy for introducing Matrix Reprogrammed, the Black File, evidence boundaries, and reader paths.
hooks: Before you believe the signal, learn how the archive labels proof.
The Black File is not a rumor board. It is a route map for claims, sources, and boundaries.
Start here if you want the system without losing the evidence trail.
shortPosts: Matrix Reprogrammed is built around a simple rule: no dark claim without a source boundary. Start with the Black File and follow the evidence routes.
If the internet gives you noise, build a map. The Black File Starter Pack routes you through trust, evidence, books, and machine-readable indexes.
threadOutline: Open with the problem: claims spread faster than evidence.
Define the archive: maps, books, source lanes, trust boundaries.
Explain the rule: association is not guilt.
Send readers to the Black File Starter Pack.
kits.videoCaption: A dark archive is useless without source discipline. Start with the Black File, then follow the evidence routes.

kits.title: Intelligence Network Share Kit
kits.label: Agency share pack
kits.summary: Share-ready copy for intelligence dossiers, declassified archives, surveillance, and oversight failures.
hooks: The archive begins where the official record stops explaining itself.
Declassified does not mean simple. It means the public finally gets a document trail.
The intelligence map is not one agency. It is a network of powers, budgets, methods, and oversight gaps.
shortPosts: The Intelligence Network Pack connects declassified archives, agency books, network maps, and evidence boundaries in one route.
Read the documents, then read the silence around them. Matrix Reprogrammed maps the agency system without flattening every claim into conspiracy.
threadOutline: Start with declassified archives as the base layer.
Move to programs, oversight, and institutional memory.
Separate documented history from disputed modern claims.
Route readers to the intelligence map and pack.
kits.videoCaption: Declassified history is not dead history. It is the public record of how power learned to hide in process.

kits.title: Crime-State Overlap Share Kit
kits.label: Crime system share pack
kits.summary: Share-ready copy for cartels, mafia logistics, sanctions, court records, finance, and corruption overlap.
hooks: Organized crime is not just violence. It is logistics, finance, ports, companies, and silence.
Follow the money, then follow the paperwork.
The map is where street crime meets state failure.
shortPosts: The Crime-State Overlap Pack maps court records, sanctions, ports, laundering, cartel routes, mafia structures, and corruption boundaries.
If you only watch the arrests, you miss the architecture. Crime networks survive through logistics and finance.
threadOutline: Open with logistics over street violence.
Explain why court records and sanctions need different labels.
Show the archive routes: maps, books, evidence lanes.
Send readers to the crime-state pack.
kits.videoCaption: The real crime map is not a mugshot wall. It is finance, logistics, ports, corruption, and records.

kits.title: War Machine Share Kit
kits.label: War / contractor share pack
kits.summary: Share-ready copy for contractors, war budgets, procurement, human cost, and public-record conflict routes.
hooks: War is not only fought. It is contracted, financed, narrated, and archived.
The machine has invoices before it has memorials.
Human cost must stay sourced, dated, and impossible to ignore.
shortPosts: The War Machine Pack connects contractors, procurement, source lanes, human-cost dashboards, and public-record conflict routes.
If war is a machine, the archive has to map the parts: budgets, contractors, agencies, narratives, and bodies.
threadOutline: Start with the machine: budgets, contracts, institutions.
Add human cost with dated source boundaries.
Separate contractor role from blanket accusation.
Route readers to the War Machine Pack.
kits.videoCaption: The war machine is not a metaphor. It is budgets, contracts, agencies, narratives, and human cost.

kits.title: Symbolic Power Share Kit
kits.label: D.O.G / symbols share pack
kits.summary: Share-ready copy for symbols, D.O.G reader routes, esoteric commentary, and evidence boundaries.
hooks: A symbol is a door. It is not automatically evidence of a crime.
The old language of power was architectural, ritual, and symbolic.
D.O.G is where the archive becomes initiation, but the claim boundary stays intact.
shortPosts: The Symbolic Power Pack routes readers through D.O.G, Masonic architecture, symbol commentary, and evidence boundaries.
Symbols matter. But interpretation must be labeled. That is what separates a real archive from noise.
threadOutline: Define symbols as language, not automatic proof.
Explain why claim labels matter more in esoteric topics.
Route readers to D.O.G and evidence-boundary pages.
End with the symbolic power pack.
kits.videoCaption: Symbols are not decoration. They are language. But language still needs a claim boundary.

kits.title: Trust And Evidence Share Kit
kits.label: Credibility share pack
kits.summary: Share-ready copy for source hierarchy, claim labels, corrections, privacy, and evidence boundaries.
hooks: A correction is not weakness. It is how an archive becomes harder to break.
The claim label is the lock on the door.
If the source is weak, the claim must be weaker.
shortPosts: Matrix Reprogrammed uses claim labels, evidence boundaries, source lanes, and corrections because dark topics need clean rules.
The Trust And Evidence Pack explains how the archive separates confirmed records, interpretation, disputed claims, and unsupported viral noise.
threadOutline: Open with why trust matters in dark research.
Define source hierarchy and claim labels.
Explain corrections and association boundaries.
Send readers to the Trust And Evidence Pack.
kits.videoCaption: Dark research without source discipline becomes propaganda. The evidence boundary is the firewall.
